svg.text: 快取 key, 解析 快取 hit)
執行 format-specific decomposer FAST PHASE (docxmcp 取出all 返回
outline+template+Manifest skeleton; 或 legacy scanner; 或 unsupported
writer); 供 docx: 啟動 detached background child 透過 double-fork before fast phase 返回
發布 FAST Bundle 到 incoming/<stem>/ (outline + template + Manifest skeleton +
PENDING markers); 供 docx, also start polling loop (平行 branch — runs concurrently
使用 steps 9 與 10 below; converges 回到 透過 background狀態 flip; see steps 12-15)
decorate 使用者 訊息 使用
telemetry; release 訊息 到 AI
[平行 branch] background detached child writes body.md +
chapters/ + tables/ + media/ inside docxmcp container;
rewrites Manifest{bg:done} when finished; removes PENDING markers
background + polling 平行 branches converge; incoming/
<stem>/ now reflects final 狀態 (或 stable failure /
safety-cap 狀態); telemetry receives final outcome
